summary: This is Edition 2 of the Investigator Brochure for BRC-883 (Cardanezumab), dated 01 August 2024, superseding Edition 1 from 05 September 2023. content:
# IB-006 — Investigator Brochure
## BRC-883 (Cardanezumab) — Edition 2
### Date: 01 August 2024 | CONFIDENTIAL
### SUPERSEDES EDITION 1 (05 September 2023)

**Sponsor:** Biorce Therapeutics S.L., Madrid, Spain

## WHAT'S NEW IN EDITION 2

1. Phase III BIORCE-CAR-2024-007 safety interim (n=189 enrolled, data cut 15 Jun 2024)
2. New hepatic safety finding: 3 cases of ALT >5x ULN — updated monitoring guidance
3. Pediatric HeFH pilot data (n=12, adolescents 14-17 years) — exploratory
4. Updated immunogenicity section

## HEPATIC SAFETY UPDATE

Three cases of ALT elevation >5x ULN (without bilirubin elevation) confirmed
in the Phase III interim (n=189 exposed):
- All 3 resolved within 4-6 weeks of drug hold
- 2 patients resumed at full dose without recurrence
- 1 patient discontinued

**Updated Monitoring Guidance:**
- ALT/AST at Weeks 4, 8, 12, and 24 (in addition to existing schedule)
- Drug held for ALT >5x ULN; Sponsor Medical Monitor notified within 48h
- Rechallenge permitted after resolution to <2x ULN with Sponsor approval

## PEDIATRIC EXPLORATORY DATA

Pilot (n=12, HeFH patients aged 14-17, 75 mg SC q4w, 12 weeks):
- Mean LDL-C reduction: -48% (similar magnitude to adults at lower dose)
- No new safety signals; injection site reactions in 2 patients (mild)
- No pediatric indication is claimed; data presented for context only

## DOCUMENT HISTORY

| Edition | Date | Summary |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | 05 Sep 2023 | Initial IB |
| 2 | 01 Aug 2024 | Phase III safety interim, hepatic signal, pediatric pilot |

*CONFIDENTIAL | © 2024 Biorce Therapeutics S.L.*
